This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected 0 but got 250
[FAIL] Offsets for: self-y-start center
  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected 100 but got 250
[FAIL] Offsets for: self-y-start self-x-end
  assert_equals: Check expected offsetTop expected 0 but got 225
[FAIL] Offsets for: center self-x-start
  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected 0 but got 250
[FAIL] Offsets for: center self-x-end
  assert_equals: Check expected offsetTop expected 150 but got 225

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected 0 but got 250

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected 100 but got 250

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected 100 but got 250
